tool_args.label: F/M subway lines swap began December 8, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: update on the F/M subway lines swap, which began on December 8th

payload.description: F/M subway lines swap began, providing additional M service during weekday rush periods and enabling station rehabilitation work at 21st Street and Queensbridge

evidence_refs.source_quote: update on the F/M subway lines swap, which began on December 8 th . He noted that the benefits of this change for customers include additional M service during the weekday rush periods that make shorter wait times and less crowded trains, and critical station rehabilitation work at 21 st and Queensbridge

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: New subway car facility opened in Sunset Park Brooklyn (November 2025)
tool_args.raw_text: the opening in November of the first brand-new, full-scale subway car facility of its kind, located in Sunset Park Brooklyn

payload.description: Opening of first brand-new, full-scale subway car facility in Sunset Park Brooklyn, with monthly testing of 30 new cars; location chosen for ability to accept cars by truck, rail and barge and direct connection to mainline tracks

evidence_refs.source_quote: opening in November of the first brand-new, full-scale subway car facility of its kind, located in Sunset Park Brooklyn. He projected monthly testing of 30 new cars at the facility. He explained that the location was chosen for its ability to accept cars by truck, rail and barge, and because it offers a direct connection to the mainline tracks

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Station upgrades expected by end of year
tool_args.raw_text: He provided an update on station upgrades that are expected to be completed by the end of year, which include the installation of platform barriers, LED lighting in every station, fare gate fortifications, and cameras on subways and station platforms.
